_comment: SERVER-ONLY anti-bot tuning. UNLIKE server/config.json this file is NEVER delivered to the client, so a bot can't read the verification distance or the datacenter policy and tune around it. Edit + restart to apply. See server/botGuard.js. ROLLOUT: started 2026-05-30 in OBSERVATION mode (datacenter+honeypot = 'measure') — tags + logs + fires GA but traps nobody, so real players are never affected. After validating hit-rate (~3 weeks, mid-June 2026) flip datacenter.action -> 'tarpit' (or 'block') and honeypot.action -> 'tarpit' to enforce.

datacenter._comment: Policy for connections whose IP falls inside server/data/datacenter-cidrs.json. action: 'tarpit' = shadow-segment into the dead room; 'block' = hard-reject the socket handshake; 'measure' = tag + server-log only, let them play (OBSERVATION rollout — current). bypassForAuthed: a signed-in Supabase user is almost certainly human, so skip the datacenter check for them.

honeypot._comment: Policy when a client trips the invisible decoy control (a human never sees/clicks it). action: 'tarpit' = divert to dead room; 'measure' = flag + log only (OBSERVATION rollout — current). GA bot_trap event fires either way.

humanVerify._comment: Emit the one-shot 'verifiedHuman' signal (-> GA verified_human key event) once a client's kart has actually travelled minTravelPx under its own server-simulated input. A pageview-only bot that never opens a socket / never drives a kart never crosses this and never counts as a verified human.
